policy.homepage_limit: Exactly two homepage surfaces are allowed: production and sandbox.
policy.default_decision: Extend or attach to an existing canonical owner before creating a new surface.
policy.merge_candidate_rule: If two plausible canonical owners exist, stop and ask before coding.

surfaces.label: Public Homepage
surfaces.description: Production public homepage and one sandbox duplicate for experimentation.

duplicate_policy.allowed_reason: One sandbox duplicate for interactive experimentation.

surfaces.label: Context Continuity
surfaces.description: Agent duplicate-prevention, canonical attachment, memory packet, and continuity reporting layer.

duplicate_policy.allowed_reason: Extend the continuity layer in place.

surfaces.label: Agent Skill System
surfaces.description: ChefFlow skill routing, validation, replay, maturity, and closeout evidence.

duplicate_policy.allowed_reason: Add to the existing skill harness.

surfaces.label: Autonomous V1 Builder Loop
surfaces.description: Internal governed path from ideas to V1 governor classification, approved queue, Codex builder execution, validation receipts, and Mission Control monitoring.

duplicate_policy.allowed_reason: Extend the governed V1 builder contract instead of creating another queue or autonomous agent surface.

surfaces.label: Sticky Notes Intake Layer
surfaces.description: Internal local source adapter that turns Simple Sticky Notes records into captured, classified, attached, activated, deferred, archived, personal, or restricted intake records.

duplicate_policy.allowed_reason: Attach Sticky Notes work to the local intake layer instead of client intake, Remy memory, or an ungoverned backlog.

surfaces.label: ChefFlow Command Plane
surfaces.description: Canonical user-facing operating state contract for next action, blockers, risk, proof, recent changes, and page context across dashboard, event, client, finance, menus, and Remy read-only answers.

duplicate_policy.allowed_reason: Attach command-plane behavior to the canonical computed contract instead of creating another dashboard, Remy hub, command palette, or page-local action list.

surfaces.label: Remy AI
surfaces.description: ChefFlow conversational assistant, memory, privacy, and local/cloud AI routing.

duplicate_policy.allowed_reason: Attach new assistant behavior to Remy or its shared AI modules.

surfaces.label: Inventory and Pantry
surfaces.description: Inventory, pantry engine, receiving, stock counts, and ingredient flow.

duplicate_policy.allowed_reason: Deepen the inventory domain in place.

surfaces.label: Calendar and Scheduling
surfaces.description: Calendar entries, availability, protected time, scheduling, and conflict command center.

duplicate_policy.allowed_reason: Attach to calendar and scheduling modules.

surfaces.label: Voice Operations
surfaces.description: Voice calling, call consent, menu call coordination, and post-call execution.

surfaces.label: Chef Flow Replay
surfaces.description: Replay model, activity digest, action recommendations, and operator review.

duplicate_policy.allowed_reason: Extend replay model and components in place.

surfaces.label: Client Intake
surfaces.description: Public booking, inquiries, embed widget, intake lanes, and client onboarding.

duplicate_policy.allowed_reason: Attach to the existing intake lane contract.

surfaces.label: Finance and Ledger
surfaces.description: Ledger-first financial model, quotes, payments, payouts, and cents accounting.

duplicate_policy.allowed_reason: Financial behavior must attach to ledger and quote owners.
